questionHtml: Explain the relative lengths of the three bonds between N and O in nitric acid.
markschemeHtml:
Any three of:

two N-O same length/order ✔
delocalization/resonance ✔

N-OH longer «than N-O»
OR
N-OH bond order 1 AND N-O bond order 1½ ✔

 

Award [2 max] if bond strength, rather than bond length discussed.

Accept N-O between single and double bond AND N-OH single bond.

meta.title: Explain the relative lengths of the three bonds between N and O in nitric acid.
breadcrumbLabels: 14.1 Covalent bonding and electron domain and molecular geometries
